'''makïffïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:laari|laari]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-k-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:laari|laari]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| makïffïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || mækïffïfth || mækïffïfj || mækïffïfsh || mækïffïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || makïfkïffïfth || makïfkïffïfj || makïfkïffïfsh || makïfkïffïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || makïffïfth || makïffïfj || makïffïfsh || makïffïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || makïfffïffth || makïfffïffj || makïfffïffsh || makïfffïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || makïffïfïf || makïffïfïf || makïffïfïf || makïffïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || makïffïfth || makïffïfj || makïffïfsh || makïffïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || makïffïfïfl || makïffïfïfl || makïffïfïfl || makïffïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || makïffïfïfïf || makïffïfïfïf || makïffïfïfïf || makïffïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || makïffïfïfn || makïffïfïfn || makïffïfïfn || makïffïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || makïffïfïforo || makïffïfïforo || makïffïfïforo || makïffïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words a3ddb2a]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|b480631}}
